reason: Contains ISIS terminology including 'Khilafah' (Caliphate) news, uses sectarian language ('Safavid army', 'Rafidi militias'), reports on martyrdom operations, and uses ISIS administrative divisions (Wilayat/Province of Salah al-Din)
